title: Purpose
doc_html:
§4261.103. Purpose

            The purpose of this Chapter is to recognize a less restrictive decisionmaking process and empowers supported decisionmaking as an option over interdiction for adults with disabilities who need assistance with decisions regarding daily living.

            Acts 2020, No. 258, §2.
doc_text:
§4261.103.  Purpose
The purpose of this Chapter is to recognize a less restrictive decisionmaking process
and empowers supported decisionmaking as an option over interdiction for adults with
disabilities who need assistance with decisions regarding daily living.
Acts 2020, No. 258, §2.
